title: Jubail、Eastern Province — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Jubail、Eastern Province的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Jubail是Eastern Province的一個城市，人口約475,000。A major industrial city in the Eastern Province, home to the world’s largest petrochemical complex.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
